name: the-matrix
title: The Matrix
description: Summon and dismiss a Matrix rain overlay from Raycast.
author: clins1994

preferences.name: soundsOn
preferences.title: Audio enabled
preferences.label: Audio enabled
preferences.description: Play procedural sounds when entering, idling in, and leaving the Matrix.

commands.name: blue-pill
commands.title: Take a Blue Pill
commands.subtitle: Start the Matrix rain overlay
commands.description: Start a click-through Matrix rain overlay with optional procedural audio.

commands.name: red-pill
commands.title: Take a Red Pill
commands.subtitle: Stop the Matrix rain overlay
commands.description: Stop the Matrix rain overlay with a reverse fade-out and exit sound.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
